title: Nami Steals the Going Merry Away
description: On pages 1–4, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Baratie Cook
dialogue.text: Aghhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Baratie Cook
dialogue.text: W-What's going on!?

dialogue.speaker: Baratie Cook
dialogue.text: I don't know but... maybe their munitions supply exploded!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're sorry, bro!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What is it, Sis? You've been doing nothing but stare at those wanted posters.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Oh Umm,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: No, it's nothing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh? Eyeng the high-bounty outlaws, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But it's best not to go for that guy.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: For a while, he's been keeping pretty quiet,

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: But I heard he's recently started rampaging again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: whisper

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: whisper

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OK then.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Yeah... but that 20 million bell bounty sure is hard to pass up!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But considering his strength,

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: There's a slim chance that even we would be killed by a slim margin.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Umm... Sis? Isn't that the treasure on our ship...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yup, I brought it onboard just now!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You know, we aren't planning on staying with you guys on this ship forever...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Would you two mind turning around for a sec?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I want to change my clothes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a little embarrassing so if you men could just look that way for a moment...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: C-Change clothes? N-N-NOW...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: s... sure, why not!? We'll look the other way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: S-Sister Nami sure is bold as she looks.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You uh... you don't think we'd get in too much trouble to peek just a little, do ya?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Heh, of course not. Just a little.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Right, like 2 seconds.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHA...!

dialogue.speaker: Baratie Cook
dialogue.text: What's going on, Sis!?

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
